question_tagalog: Ano ang pinaka-deepest regret mo sa buhay prior sakin?
question_english: What is your deepest regret in life prior to me?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang babalikan sa nakaraan.
quote_english: No more looking back at the past.

question_tagalog: Sa tingin mo ba, may specific purpose tayo kaya tayo nagtagpo?
question_english: Do you think we have a specific purpose why we met?
quote_tagalog: Tadhana ang naglapit sa ating dalawa.
quote_english: Destiny brought the two of us together.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bigat sa puso mo na gusto mo kong tulungan magbuhat?
question_english: What heaviness in your heart do you want me to help carry?
quote_tagalog: Andito ako para gumaan ang buhay mo.
quote_english: I'm here to lighten your life.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naramdamang you are enough bilang asawa/partner ko?
question_english: When did you feel you are enough as my spouse/partner?
quote_tagalog: Palagi kang sapat para sakin.
quote_english: You are always enough for me.

question_tagalog: Pag namatay tayo, pano mo gusto maalala natin ang isa't isa?
question_english: When we die, how do you want us to remember each other?
quote_tagalog: Dalhin natin pag-ibig sa kabilang buhay.
quote_english: Let's carry love to the afterlife.

question_tagalog: Pano natin mape-prevent yung mga failures ng past relationships natin?
question_english: How can we prevent the failures of our past relationships?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang huling pag-ibig ko.
quote_english: You are my only last love.

question_tagalog: Kailan ka naging pinaka-honest sakin?
question_english: When were you the most honest with me?
quote_tagalog: Bukas ako sayo sa lahat ng bagay.
quote_english: I am open to you about everything.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-lesson ng buhay na itinuro sayo ng pag-ibig natin?
question_english: What's the deepest life lesson our love taught you?
quote_tagalog: Love heals everything genuinely.
quote_english: Love heals everything genuinely.

question_tagalog: Bakit nahihirapan ang ibang tao magkatiwala samantalang tayo, buo kagad?
question_english: Why do others struggle to trust while we gave it wholly instantly?
quote_tagalog: Safe environment tayo sa isa't isa.
quote_english: We are a safe environment for each other.

question_tagalog: Ano ang pain point mo tuwing nag-aaway tayo nang malala?
question_english: What is your pain point whenever we argue intensely?
quote_tagalog: Kahit nagagalit ako, mas mahal kita.
quote_english: Even when mad, I love you more.

question_tagalog: Para sayo, anong definition ng successful relationship?
question_english: For you, what is the definition of a successful relationship?
quote_tagalog: Pagtanda ng magkasama at masaya.
quote_english: Growing old together happily.

question_tagalog: Pano ko binago yung mindset mo regarding sa trust?
question_english: How did I change your mindset regarding trust?
quote_tagalog: Sayong-sayo buong tiwala ko.
quote_english: My complete trust is entirely yours.

question_tagalog: Pano mo i-describe yung 'peace' na dala ng presence ko sayo?
question_english: How do you describe the 'peace' my presence brings you?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw yung payapang mundo ko.
quote_english: You are my peaceful world.

question_tagalog: Ano yung truth na natatakot kang idiscuss dahil sakin?
question_english: What is a truth you're scared to discuss because of me?
quote_tagalog: Wag kang matakot sakin, ako lang 'to.
quote_english: Don't be afraid of me, it's just me.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka bang pwedeng mamatay ang love kung hindi inaalagaan?
question_english: Do you believe love can die if not taken care of?
quote_tagalog: Araw-araw nating didiligan ang pag-ibig.
quote_english: We will water our love every day.

question_tagalog: Bakit sa tagal natin, andito pa rin tayong dalawa matatag?
question_english: Why after so long, are we still here standing strong?
quote_tagalog: Piliin natin isa't isa kahit araw-araw.
quote_english: Let's choose each other every single day.

question_tagalog: Anong character trait ko ang nagbigay sayo ng hope sa humanity?
question_english: What character trait of mine gave you hope in humanity?
quote_tagalog: Mabuti kang tao, kaya andito ako.
quote_english: You're a good person, that's why I'm here.

question_tagalog: May part ba sakin na sa tingin mo hindi kailanman magbabago?
question_english: Is there a part of me you think will never change?
quote_tagalog: Puso mo lang hindi magbabago sakin.
quote_english: Only your heart will never change towards me.

question_tagalog: Pano mo na-oovercome yung pride mo during our worst fights?
question_english: How do you overcome your pride during our worst fights?
quote_tagalog: Mas mahalaga ka kaysa sa pride ko.
quote_english: You are more important than my pride.

question_tagalog: Ano yung madalas mong panalangin para sa buhay natin ten years from now?
question_english: What do you often pray for our lives ten years from now?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko magkasama parin tayo araw-araw.
quote_english: I want us to still be together every day.

question_tagalog: Para sayo, anong pinaka masakit na paraan para iwan ka ng tao?
question_english: For you, what's the most painful way for someone to leave you?
quote_tagalog: Mamamatay ako pag iniwan mo ko.
quote_english: I'll die if you leave me.

question_tagalog: Pano mo tinuruan isip mo na tanggapin yung mali at tama sakin?
question_english: How did you teach your mind to accept my right and wrongs?
quote_tagalog: Tanggap kita buong-buo.
quote_english: I accept you entirely.

question_tagalog: Kung maikli ang oras natin, ano ang the most meaningful thing na naiwan natin?
question_english: If our time is short, what's the most meaningful thing we left behind?
quote_tagalog: Maiiwang masaya lahat ng alaala natin.
quote_english: All our memories left behind will be happy.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang maglalarawan sa connection ng mga kaluluwa natin?
question_english: What word perfectly describes the connection of our souls?
quote_tagalog: Tayo lang para sa isa't isa.
quote_english: We are only for each other.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka ba na we make our own destiny or destined na tayo before time?
question_english: Do you believe we make our own destiny or we were destined before time?
quote_tagalog: Nakasulat na sa mga tala ang pagkikita natin.
quote_english: Our meeting was written in the stars.

question_tagalog: Ano ang the hardest sacrifice you did para sakin?
question_english: What is the hardest sacrifice you did for me?
quote_tagalog: Lahat gagawin ko para sayo.
quote_english: I will do everything for you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ina-align ang dreams mo sa dreams ko?
question_english: How do you align your dreams with my dreams?
quote_tagalog: Isang pangarap lang tayong dalawa.
quote_english: Our dreams have become one.

question_tagalog: Saan ka nakakakuha ng assurance pag ang tahimik natin?
question_english: Where do you get assurance when we are quiet?
quote_tagalog: Sapat sakin pakiramdam ng presence mo.
quote_english: The feeling of your presence is enough for me.

question_tagalog: Pano mo i-describe yung growth ko simula nung naging tayo?
question_english: How do you describe my growth since we became together?
quote_tagalog: Sabay tayong naging better person.
quote_english: We became better persons together.

question_tagalog: Pano natin matuturuan magpatawad ang isa't isa without holding grudges?
question_english: How do we teach each other to forgive without holding grudges?
quote_tagalog: Puso ko ay puno ng pang-unawa para sayo.
quote_english: My heart is full of understanding for you.

question_tagalog: Anong pinagdadaanan ko na feeling mo kailangan kitang tulungan constantly?
question_english: What am I going through that you feel you need to help me with constantly?
quote_tagalog: Sasalo ako palagi ng bigat mo.
quote_english: I will always catch your burdens.

question_tagalog: Kung may reinkarnasyon, pano tayo maghahanapan?
question_english: If reincarnation exists, how will we find each other?
quote_tagalog: Hahanapin ka ng kaluluwa ko kahit saan.
quote_english: My soul will search for you everywhere.

question_tagalog: Bakit sa dami ng tao sa paligid natin, ako ang pinili mong sandalan?
question_english: Why amidst so many people, did you choose to lean on me?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang pahinga ng isip ko.
quote_english: You are my mind's only rest.

question_tagalog: Pano minsan binabasag ng logic yung emotions natin in a fight?
question_english: How does logic sometimes shatter our emotions in a fight?
quote_tagalog: Love natin lalawig kahit magulong logic.
quote_english: Our love persists despite confused logic.

question_tagalog: Iniisip mo ba na may limitation ang pag-ibig ko sayo?
question_english: Do you think my love for you has limitations?
quote_tagalog: Wag mo limitahan ang love mo sakin.
quote_english: Don't limit your love for me.

question_tagalog: Ano yung the deepest joy you felt dahil lang nakasama kita saglit?
question_english: What's the deepest joy you felt just by being with me for a while?
quote_tagalog: Minsan yakap lang buo na ko.
quote_english: Sometimes just a hug makes me whole.

question_tagalog: Pano binabago ng financial struggle ang connection nating dalawa?
question_english: How does financial struggle alter our connection?
quote_tagalog: Magtulungan tayo kahit mahirap buhay.
quote_english: Let's help each other out despite a hard life.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka ba na time heals, or love heals everything?
question_english: Do you believe time heals, or love heals everything?
quote_tagalog: Pinapagaling ako ng mismong presence mo.
quote_english: Your presence itself heals me.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ituturo sakin pano maging matapang when facing my fears?
question_english: How will you teach me to be brave when facing my fears?
quote_tagalog: Andito ko sa likod mo as your shield.
quote_english: I am right behind you as your shield.

question_tagalog: Ano ang the most painful truth na natutunan mo about yourself ever since we met?
question_english: What is the most painful truth you learned about yourself ever since we met?
quote_tagalog: Na-realize kong kailangan kita.
quote_english: I realized I needed you.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging bato tayo parehas para forever na magkatabi, papayag ka?
question_english: If we became stones to be next to each other forever, would you agree?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong porma, basta katabi kita.
quote_english: Any form, as long as I am beside you.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang gagamitin mo para ilarawan ang pagmamahalan ng ating mga kaluluwa?
question_english: What word will you use to describe the love of our souls?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang dalawang kaluluwang naging isa.
quote_english: We are two souls that became one.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naisip na kaya nating tanggapin kahit yung pinakamalalang mali natin?
question_english: When did you think we could accept even our worst mistakes?
quote_tagalog: Naiintindihan at papatawarin palagi kita.
quote_english: I will always understand and forgive you.

question_tagalog: Saan natin nakukuha yung patience na 'to for each other despite everything?
question_english: Where do we get this patience for each other despite everything?
quote_tagalog: Mahaba pasensya ko basta nagmamahal ako sayo.
quote_english: My patience is long as long as I love you.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ina-assess kung lumalaki na tayo apart or mas napapalapit?
question_english: How do you assess if we are growing apart or closer?
quote_tagalog: Nararamdaman ko pag-ibig mo lalong higit.
quote_english: I feel your love even greater.

question_tagalog: Sino satin dalawa ang mas capable mag-endure ng pain in silence?
question_english: Who between the two of us is more capable of enduring pain in silence?
quote_tagalog: Wag mong kayanin mag-isa ang sakit.
quote_english: Don't bear the pain alone.

question_tagalog: Tingin mo ba ang love is a choice na ginagawa natin araw-araw?
question_english: Do you think love is a choice we make every single day?
quote_tagalog: Araw-araw kitang pipiliin nang paulit-ulit.
quote_english: I will repeatedly choose you every single day.

question_tagalog: Kung magkaproblema tayo na sobrang lala, kailan tayo bibitaw?
question_english: If we encounter a super severe problem, when will we let go?
quote_tagalog: Hinding-hindi tayo susuko sa atin.
quote_english: We will never give up on us.

question_tagalog: Pano natin matutulungan yung isa't isa na makita value nila on bad days?
question_english: How can we help each other see their value on bad days?
quote_tagalog: Sobrang worth it mo nang mabuhay.
quote_english: You are so worth living for.

question_tagalog: May moments bang gusto mong iiyak na lang lahat lahat sakin?
question_english: Are there moments you just want to cry everything out to me?
quote_tagalog: Dito sa balikat ko, iiyak mo lahat.
quote_english: Cry it all out here on my shoulder.

question_tagalog: Ano yung fears mo nung umpisa na ngayon thankful ka nawala na?
question_english: What fears did you have at first that you're now thankful are gone?
quote_tagalog: Dahil sayo hindi nako natatakot.
quote_english: Because of you, I'm no longer afraid.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka ba na the truest love is unconditional?
question_english: Do you believe that the truest love is unconditional?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang kundisyon pagmamahal ko sayo.
quote_english: My love for you has no conditions.

question_tagalog: Ano ang unang magiging panalangin mo pag nawala na ko?
question_english: What will be your first prayer when I am gone?
quote_tagalog: Protektahan sana kaluluwa mo kahit saan.
quote_english: May your soul be protected wherever.

question_tagalog: Bakit nahihirapan ang iba tanggapin yung mali pero tayo nagagawa natin?
question_english: Why do others struggle to accept mistakes while we manage to do it?
quote_tagalog: Pang-unawa nati'y abot langit.
quote_english: Our understanding reaches the heavens.

question_tagalog: Pano mo pinapaalala sa sarili mo that I am worth the fight?
question_english: How do you remind yourself that I am worth the fight?
quote_tagalog: Mawala na lahat, wag lang ikaw.
quote_english: Let everything be gone, just not you.

question_tagalog: Pag napanaginipan mong umalis ako, pano ka gumising?
question_english: When you dream of me leaving, how do you wake up?
quote_tagalog: Yayakapin agad kita pag gising ko.
quote_english: I'll immediately hug you upon waking.

question_tagalog: Sino sa buhay mo yung feeling mo hindi magiging proud na napunta ka sakin or proud ba sila?
question_english: Who in your life do you feel wouldn't be proud you ended up with me or are they proud?
quote_tagalog: Sobra akong proud na asawa mo ko.
quote_english: I'm extremely proud that I'm your spouse.

question_tagalog: May deepest pain ba mula sa past mo na nahihirapan pa rin ako akayin out of you?
question_english: Is there a deepest pain from your past I'm still struggling to pull you out of?
quote_tagalog: Akay-akay kita kahit ang hirap.
quote_english: I'll carry you even if it's hard.

question_tagalog: Anong trait ko na parang nakuha mo na deep inside?
question_english: What trait of mine feels like you've adopted deep inside?
quote_tagalog: Naging kamuka at kaugali na kita.
quote_english: We've started to look and act alike.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ide-describe yung bond natin na hindi nakikita pero nararamdaman?
question_english: How do you describe our bond that isn't seen but felt?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang ibang makakaalam, tayo lang.
quote_english: No one else will figure it out, just us.
